title: corybas leucotyle
intro: Corybas leucotyle, also known as the terrestrial orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. Corybas leucotyle is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
